calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Palm Beach County School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Palm Beach County School District is Monday, August 10, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Palm Beach County School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Palm Beach County School District is Thursday, May 27, 2027. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Palm Beach County School District runs March 22–26, 2027, aligning with Broward County and Miami-Dade — all three major South Florida districts break the same week. A standalone Spring Holiday on March 10 and a teacher workday on March 29 add no-school days immediately before and after the main break.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Palm Beach County School District runs December 21, 2026–January 1, 2027 (12 days). A teacher workday falls on January 4, so students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Palm Beach County School District runs November 23–27, 2026 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Holiday
yearNumbers.detail: A standalone Spring Holiday on March 10 falls 12 days before Spring Break begins — combined with the March 22-26 break and a Mar 29 teacher workday, students have three separate no-school events across a single month.

yearNumbers.label: South FL Aligned
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break aligns with Miami-Dade and Broward County this year — all three major South Florida coastal districts break the same week.

calendarNotes: The 2026–2027 school year runs from August 10, 2026, through May 27, 2027. Spring Break falls March 22–26 and aligns with Broward County Public Schools and Miami-Dade County Public Schools, making it one of the busiest travel weeks across South Florida. March also includes a standalone Spring Holiday on March 10 and a teacher workday on March 29, giving students two additional no-school days immediately before and after the main break.
